termsContent:
# Terms of Service

Welcome to Next-Videos! By accessing or using our service, you agree to be bound by these terms. Our service is provided for educational and personal use only. 

1. Use of Service: You must not use our service to download copyrighted material without permission from the copyright owner.
2. Disclaimer: We are not responsible for any misuse of the content downloaded using our service.
3. Changes: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time.
privacyContent:
# Privacy Policy

Your privacy is important to us. 

- Data Collection: We do not store any personal information from our users.
- Cookies: We may use cookies to improve your user experience.
- Third-Party Links: Our site may contain links to other websites. We are not responsible for their privacy practices.
contactContent:
# Contact Us

If you have any questions or concerns, please feel free to reach out to us at lyaritechpk@gmail.com. We'll do our best to respond to your inquiry as soon as possible.
